title: Codeq Santhananan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Codeq Santhananan |homeworld=[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] |birth= |death=c. [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'm looking for Codeq Santhananan. He been in lately?''"
"''That barve got drilled a coupla months ago. Right outside the door. I had a pair of rehab droids scrubbing the burn mark for two whole standard time periods, and it still didn't come out.|Dengar and Wuher|''[[The Mandalorian Armor]]''}} '''Codeq Santhananan''' was an individual that was in the business, among others, of transmitting messages on the behalf of customers that included [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]]. He [[Death/Legends|died]] just outside the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in debt to the establishment, the results of a conflict burned into the doorway as an irremovable stain despite the best efforts of two [[Cleaning droid/Legends|rehab droids]]. Soon after, Santhananan's legally questionable service was picked up by [[Unidentified Aeropteryx|the anonymous]] [[Aeropteryx]] responsible for hiring Codeq's killers: [[Vol Hamame]] and [[Phedroi]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Mandalorian Armor]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Codeq Santhananan }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Santhananan, Codeq}} [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Tatooinians]]
